features: 【Gradient Metallic Look & Comfortable to Wear】Our kids wireless headphones are designed in a fashionable way, with metallic pink and purple gradient effects that make these headphones stand out among the crowd,even the packaging box is shiny with a metallic effect. Additionally, our headphones for kids are light in weight, making them easy to wear for long periods without causing any discomfort. Enjoy your music with our kids-friendly headphones.

【Latest 5.3 Bluetooth & Built-In Microphone】JYPS kids bluetooth headphones adopt 5.3 Bluetooth technology, which can pair it up with your Phone stably and quickly.This bluetooth headphones can be compatible with iPad, PC, amazon fire tablet,TV etc.In addition, the over ear headphones wireless are designed with built-in mic, suitable for online classes, gaming, voice calls and more.

【Adjustable Headband and Foldable Design】The adjustable headband can easily fit any head shape, ensuring our toddler headphones suitable for children and teenagers aged 2,3,4,5,6,7-16+.The foldable design makes bluetooth headphones kids 7-14 easy to pack and suitable for boys and girls to school, camping, travel, and other outdoor activities.

【 2 in 1 Wireless & Wired Mode - Long Playtime】JYPS Wireless children's headphones allow your child to enjoy music, learning, video, and calling in Bluetooth mode for a long time.The Bluetooth headphones also come with a 3.5mm spare jack, allowing unlimited playback time in wired mode. In addition, USB charging only takes two hours to fully charge.

【High fidelity stereo bass 】The kids wireless headphones for boys and girls provides rich bass and lifelike audio.Our Bluetooth earphones allow your child to enjoy high fidelity strong bass, crisp and clear music all day long.Whether you’re listening to music or watching a movie, our kids headphones provide exceptional audio quality.
